company.name: List Of Construction companies in Douala - rentechdigital.com
company.snippet: There are 187 Construction companies in Douala as of October 15, 2025; which is an 5.06% increase from 2023. Of these locations, 183 Construction companies which is 97.86% of all Construction companies in Douala are single-owner operations, while the remaining 4 which is 2.14% are part of larger brands. Average age of Construction companies in Douala is 2 years and 10 months.

company.name: Cameroon Homes: Discover Your Dream Home - africa-housing.com
company.snippet: Our two developments in Cameroon are located in the peaceful suburbs of Yaoundé, in the growing north side of the city, near Olembe Stadium. Whether you're planning to move back home, reconnect with your African roots, or make a smart investment, Jobomax Homes makes homeownership in Cameroon easy.

company.name: Low Cost Housing in Cameroon | Social Housing | Karmod
company.snippet: Low cost housing in Cameroon We are a frontline real estate development and management company located in Cameroon metropolis, the commercial hub of Cameroon with over fourteen years' experience in delivering premium quality Low cost housing to hundreds of clients in search of class, comfort and exclusivity.

company.name: Codecis : Real Estate Agency Cameroon, Yaounde, Douala
company.snippet: CODECIS is a service provider company specializing in real estate in Cameroon, Yaoundé, Douala, and all major cities.

company.name: MET-BTP - Construisons avec assurance
company.snippet: Depuis deux décénies, MET-BTP s'affirme comme une entreprise de travaux publics, BTP et génie civil leader au Cameroun. Spécialisés dans le génie civil, le terrassement, la démolition, les VRD (voiries et réseaux divers), les fondations spéciales, et le soutènement, nous apportons des solutions adaptées aux besoins de chaque projet.

company.name: Entreprises de bâtiments et travaux publics (BTP) à Yaoundé et au Cameroun
company.snippet: Secteur du BTP, des travaux publics et d'édification d'ouvrages au Cameroun. Trouvez les coordonnées et adresses des entreprises du BTP et de construction de bâtiments et ouvrages publics à Yaoundé, Douala et dans tout (e) le Cameroun
